mapper.select: select e.emp_id, e.emp_no, e.emp_name from employee e where e.com_id = #{comId} and (e.emp_name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or e.emp_no like '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

select d.dept_name as deptName, pm.pm_id, e.emp_id, p.pro_name, e.emp_name, pm.member_role, pm.joined_at from project_member pm join employee e on pm.emp_id=e.emp_id join project p on p.pro_id=pm.project_pro_id join department d on d.dept_id=e.dept_id where p.pro_id = #{value}
select pm.*, e.emp_name from project_member pm join employee e on pm.emp_id = e.emp_id where pm.pm_id = #{pmId}
select pm.pm_id, e.emp_name from project_member pm join employee e on pm.emp_id = e.emp_id where pm.project_pro_id = #{value}
